channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging trees from charlton park, 28th June
item.description:
Cant walk down pavement unless bent double

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cemetery Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped Mattress, 28th June
item.description:
Mattress dumped near the Courtland Grove sign.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Summerton Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 'Balloon' drug canisters dumped., 28th June
item.description:
'Balloon' drug canisters dumped. Pressurised aerosol canisters likely to be highly flammable, especially in heat

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crown Woods Way, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 28th June
item.description:
Someone drove around and dumped rubbish, vehicle registration cn18dfu

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sycamore Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Breaking away of gutter approximately 15 meters long which has been marked by white paint but has now been washed away., 28th June
item.description:
Believe the white lines marked by you was there for approximately 6 months but have now been washed away over a period of time by the rain.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pines Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tip, 28th June
item.description:
Various waste and mattress.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge metal container flytipped, 28th June
item.description:
Someone has dumped a huge metal container here on the pavement and street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Akerman Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Renovation Rubble, 28th June
item.description:
A house across the park is being renovated and yesterday morning we saw the decorators loading the bins up with building waste, now the bins are full and overflowing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Quilp Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possibly abandoned vehicle., 28th June
item.description:
A black MG registration LY25 AXC has been parked on the double yellow lines at the entrance of Weir Road for several weeks, and hasn’t been seen to have been moved at any point. There is a blue badge on the dashboard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Weir Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple large bags and boxes dumped behind bus stop, 28th June
item.description:
Behind Bus stop on Petts Wood road very close to junction with Crossway. Multiple large bags and boxes dumped behind bus stop. This has been a recurring issue. In the past have heard that clinical waste has been dumped here (hence gloves?).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Petts Wood Road, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street filled with garbage, 28th June
item.description:
Eltham Palace Road is littered with garbage as you walk along from kingsground. The street has not been cleaned for weeks. Please can this be cleared.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eltham Palace Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light spill, 28th June
item.description:
Please install a house side light shield on the lamppost outside No.1 Radnor Road. The light spills into the front windows at night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Radnor Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trolley, 28th June
item.description:
Abandoned shopping trolley

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Ethelbert Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Climbing Frame is loose in the ground, 28th June
item.description:
The climbing frame is loose in the ground. When multiple children are on it it shakes to the point where it isn't safe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maitland Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lidl shopping trolley, 28th June
item.description:
This has been here for 2 nights. It could fall into the road and cause an accident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter left in road need removing please, 28th June
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed car abandoned on Marlow Road for several weeks, 28th June
item.description:
This car has been there for several weeks now and it has become an eyesore and parking obstruction for locals and visitors to the area.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wheathill Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle with false number plate, 28th June
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle with false number plate

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wrottesley Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken parasol umbrella, 28th June
item.description:
Someone has fly tipped a broken large parasol and stand

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queenswood Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside apartment beside the sainsburys across from north london tavern, 28th June
item.description:
Rubbish building up since two days ago progressively getting worse.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load
